title: Slidinnng Puzzle
description: A classic sliding puzzle (15-puzzle) with guaranteed solvability, smooth CSS transform animations, keyboard + click controls, chronometer telemetry, and localStorage high-score persistence across 3×3 and 4×4 grids.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: Solvability-sanity engine: Fisher-Yates shuffle looped through inversion-count parity check guaranteeing 100% solvability before every game start
2D coordinate sliding: Manhattan distance (|dx|+|dy|===1) collision check for both click and keyboard (arrows + WASD) input
CSS cubic-bezier transform transition: tiles glide via translate(x,y) with 0.14s ease-out overshoot curve
Chronometer system: setInterval 1s tick starts on first move, dual-digit MM:SS display, auto-freeze on victory
Bi-directional dimension switch: 3×3 and 4×4 modes with separate localStorage keys for independent best records
Per-tile HSL color gradient: each number receives a unique hue based on its value / total tiles on the 170-430 spectrum
Dark terminal glassmorphic aesthetic: #05070c base, frosted panel borders, cyan/amber/green telemetry triad
